use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ACUTE PROMYELOCYTIC LEUKEMIA (APL) IN PATIENTS WHOSE APL IS CHARACTERIZED BY THE PRESENCE OF THE (15;17) TRANSLOCATION OR PML/RAR-ALPHA GENE EXPRESSION

TREATING PATIENTS WITH ACUTE PROMYELOCYTIC LEUKEMIA (APL) WHO ARE REFRACTORY TO, OR HAVE RELAPSED FROM, RETINOID AND ANTHRACYCLINE CHEMOTHERAPY, AND WHOSE APL IS CHARACTERIZED BY THE PRESENCE OF THE T(15;17) TRANSLOCATION OR PML/RAR-ALPHA GENE EXPRESSION

IN COMBINATION WITH TRETINOIN, TREATING ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 1 YEAR AND OLDER WITH NEWLY-DIAGNOSED LOW-RISK ACUTE PROMYELOCYTIC LEUKEMIA (APL) CHARACTERIZED BY THE PRESENCE OF THE T(15;17) TRANSLOCATION OR PML/RAR-A GENE EXPRESSION
